entities.bank: Parity Fixture Bank A1 — single entity

scenario_name: De Novo Bank — baseline assumptions (source: engagement workbook)
conversion_notes: loans: monthly originations x3 -> quarterly; annual prepay /4 -> runoff_q; opening balances are Day-1 zero per source
Time Deposits / CDs: average maturity 24 months is not modeled (maturity-ladder liability is a phase-2 mechanic); cost and path carried, term structure disclosed as unsupported
Brokered: average maturity 12 months is not modeled (maturity-ladder liability is a phase-2 mechanic); cost and path carried, term structure disclosed as unsupported

deposits: flat $-adds converted by computing the source's monthly path (B*(1-runoff/12)+add), sampling quarterly EOP, opening = Q1 EOP, growth pinned per quarter via overrides — path exact, not approximated
securities yield = AFS cell; HTM yield differs (4.2%) — single-book engine, AFS value used, HTM noted; other-assets-% (2% of assets) unsupported as a formula, template constant kept
